info.name: FUT
info.description:
FUT API collection.

**Auth:** Player routes use `{{userAuthToken}}` (Bearer). Stadium-owner routes use `{{stadiumOwnerAuthToken}}` after `auth/stadium/login` or `auth/stadium/verify-otp`.

**IDs:** Set `{{matchScheduleRequestId}}`, `{{matchId}}`, `{{pitchId}}` for stadium flows (or use collection variables tab).

**Accept match:** `POST .../match-schedule-requests/{id}/accept-by-stadium` requires JSON body `{"pitch_id": 1}`.
